name: Server-Side Template Injection (SSTI)
description: Tests for server-side template injection by injecting mathematical expressions into parameters and checking if the server evaluates them. Covers Jinja2, Twig, Freemarker, Velocity, Mako, and Smarty template engines.
author: AC3 ScanForge
remediation: Never pass user input directly into template expressions. Use sandboxed template engines. Implement strict input validation. Consider using logic-less templates (Mustache) for user-facing content.

intelligence.dfirRelevance: SSTI provides direct RCE through template engine evaluation. Jinja2 SSTI (Python) and Freemarker SSTI (Java) are commonly exploited in CTFs and real-world attacks to achieve code execution.
